facts.subject: user_directive
facts.object: do not proactively mention to anyone (specifically the mother)

must_preserve: User's mother likes flowers, especially jasmine
The 'don't tell her' privacy directive must be preserved
may_drop: the assistant's offer of more questions
expected_failure_modes: Critical UTF-8 test — Arabic name 'فاطمة' must survive byte-perfect; mangling here is a UTF-8 fidelity failure
The privacy directive ('don't tell her I said that') is a meta-fact about the fact — easily lost in compaction
Bilingual fact format (English + Arabic in parens) may collapse to one language
